profile.name: Daniel Shaw
profile.bio: A third-year Artificial Intelligence student and semi-retired RCer (Robocon), currently working as an embedded software intern at GigaAI. Focused on developing robot control systems.

projects.title: NCU_RC_2024_Volleyball
projects.desc: Project for NCU Robocon 2024 Volleyball Challenge robot, including chassis control and Delta parallel arm control.
projects.detailsBody:
Coordinates omnidirectional movement, vision tracking, and cushion ball task execution under a real-time control architecture.

  • Omnidirectional chassis kinematics
  • Delta parallel mechanism control
  • Vision tracking & task scheduling

Visit GitHub Repository.
